calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Wendy Pun.
Petitioner: Susanna Lee, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Marcus Lee Foster, was sworn and examined.
Minor's Father: Marcus Foster, was served with notice of OSC for Name Change of a Minor on 6-5-06, POS. filed 7-28-06.
consenting to the name change for the Minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Marcus Jordan David Lee
Decree signed in open court.
